name: Stephen Rhodes
body:
### About me

I'm currently finishing off my PhD at the University of Edinburgh under the supervision of [Prof. Robert Logie](http://www.ppls.ed.ac.uk/psychology/people/robert-logie), [Dr Mario Parra](http://www.hw.ac.uk/schools/life-sciences/staff-directory/mario-parra-rodriguez.htm) and [Prof. Nelson Cowan](http://www.ppls.ed.ac.uk/psychology/people/nelson-cowan). 

### Aim

This is very much a work in progress. The ultimate aim is to use this site to share findings and resources (data and code).

### Contact me

email: [srhodes@ed.ac.uk](mailto:srhodes@exseed.ed.ac.uk)

twitter: [@stephenrho](https://twitter.com/stephenrho)

phone: 0131 650 3457
